title: Lily's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: A gentle exploration of emotions through colors as baby Lily experiences different feelings throughout her day, from happy yellow sunshine to calm blue skies.

pages.text: This is Lily. Lily has many feelings. Her feelings have colors!

illustration.description: A smiling toddler girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes standing in a room filled with swirling rainbow colors representing different emotions floating around her
illustration.alt: Lily surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Lily is happy, she feels yellow! Yellow like the warm sunshine.

illustration.description: A joyful toddler girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes laughing and clapping her hands, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and golden swirls
illustration.alt: Happy Lily with yellow sunshine colors

pages.text: When Lily is sad, she feels blue. Blue like gentle rain drops.

illustration.description: A crying toddler girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with tears on her cheeks, surrounded by soft blue rain drops and gentle blue swirls
illustration.alt: Sad Lily with blue rain colors

pages.text: When Lily is angry, she feels red! Red like hot fire.

illustration.description: A frowning toddler girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with crossed arms and puffed cheeks, surrounded by swirling red flames and angry red zigzags
illustration.alt: Angry Lily with red fire colors

pages.text: When Lily is calm, she feels green. Green like soft grass.

illustration.description: A peaceful toddler girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sitting quietly with a gentle smile, surrounded by soft green grass waves and peaceful green swirls
illustration.alt: Calm Lily with green grass colors

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Lily loves her colorful feelings!

illustration.description: A content toddler girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with arms spread wide, surrounded by a beautiful rainbow of all emotion colors blending together harmoniously
illustration.alt: Lily embracing all her colorful feelings

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Lily feel when she is happy?
questions.explanation: When Lily is happy, she feels yellow like warm sunshine!

questions.question: What color does Lily feel when she is sad?
questions.explanation: When Lily is sad, she feels blue like gentle rain drops.

questions.question: Are all of Lily's feelings okay?
questions.explanation: Yes! All feelings are okay. Lily loves her colorful feelings!
